issues.description: Missing prerequisite action: effect requires resting this Character as a cost before SearchDeck can occur. DSL must include Rest action for this card as first action.
SearchDeck filter incomplete: must specify 'count':5 to look at top 5 cards, and 'maxReveal':1 to reveal up to 1 card. Current filter lacks these constraints.
Missing action for card ordering: effect allows placing rest of 5 cards at bottom of deck 'in any order' - requires additional context or separate shuffle/order action not captured.
